protocol.name: preflight-check
protocol.objective: Validate all workflow variables and paths before execution begins

flow.step: Collect all variables from the resolved workflow config

Check each variable has a non-empty value. Variables that should be resolved by now: - {project-root} — must point to actual filesystem path - {installed_path} — must point to workflow directory - {date} — must be current date - Any {config_source}:field references — must be resolved from module config
Check all file paths exist on disk: - instructions file (required) - validation/checklist file (if declared) - template file (if declared) - config_source file (if using runtime resolution)

Check all required input files exist: - For each entry in input_file_patterns where required=true - Resolve any template variables in the path - Verify the file or glob pattern matches at least one file

If any check fails: - Collect ALL failures (do not stop at first) - Report each failure with: variable name or file path, expected value, actual value - HALT execution — do not proceed to step processing
If all checks pass: return success and proceed to instruction loading
